name: Use of Externally-Controlled Format String
description: The product uses a format string function (printf, sprintf, syslog) with a format string that is externally controlled, allowing attackers to use format specifiers like %x to read stack memory or %n to write arbitrary values to memory.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data that is passed as the format string argument to TRANSFORM[format_function] (printf, sprintf, fprintf, syslog, NSLog) instead of as a data argument, without a CONTROL node that ensures format strings are always static/hardcoded literals
